question_intent: average goals per game ratio for players who won a championship and were named an All-Star

plan.question_intent: average goals per game ratio for players who won a championship and were named an All-Star
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.playerid, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.tmid, leaf_1.g, leaf_1.gp, leaf_1.award, leaf_1.tmidwinner FROM {{leaf_1}} AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.g, s.gp, a.award, sp.tmidwinner
join_clauses: JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
blocks.notes: player scoring records joined with All-Star awards and championship series records

build_logs.notes: player scoring records joined with All-Star awards and championship series records

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')
LIMIT 5

SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.g, s.gp, a.award, sp.tmidwinner
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')

SELECT *
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.g, s.gp, a.award, sp.tmidwinner
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.g / NULLIF(leaf_1.gp, 0))
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.g, s.gp, a.award, sp.tmidwinner
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(pts) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average ratio of games played to games played (excluding zero games played) among players who received an All-Star award and whose team won the series?
